# Unity Generated Folders
# =========================
[Ll]ibrary/
[Tt]emp/
[Oo]bj/
[Bb]uild/
[Bb]uilds/
[Ll]ogs/
[Uu]ser[Ss]ettings/

# =========================
# Auto Generated VS/MD/Consulo Files
# =========================
*.csproj
*.unityproj
*.sln
*.suo
*.tmp
*.user
*.userprefs
*.pidb
*.booproj
*.svd
*.pdb
*.mdb
*.opendb
*.VC.db

# =========================
# Unity3D Generated Meta Files
# =========================
*.pidb.meta
*.pdb.meta
*.mdb.meta

# =========================
# Crash Reports
# =========================
sysinfo.txt

# =========================
# Build Results
# =========================
*.apk
*.aab
*.unitypackage
*.app
*.exe

# =========================
# OS Files
# =========================
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# =========================
# Visual Studio Code
# =========================
.vscode/

# =========================
# Rider
# =========================
.idea/

# =========================
# Unity Addressables
# =========================
/[Aa]ssets/[Aa]ddressable[Aa]ssets[Dd]ata/*/*.bin*

# =========================
# Memory Captures
# =========================
/[Mm]emoryCaptures/

# =========================
# Recordings
# =========================
/[Aa]ssets/[Rr]ecordings/

# =========================
# Asset Store Tools
# =========================
/[Aa]ssets/AssetStoreTools*

# =========================
# Logs
# =========================
*.log

# =========================
# Others
# =========================
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Desktop.ini
